dodge.about: Dodge falling balls across 4 lanes. Move one lane at a time — left or right. Survive as long as you can!

config.subtitle: Pick a difficulty before jumping in
config.title: Game settings

controlSourceDesc.bci: BCI signal control, requires model deployment on the left panel.
controlSourceDesc.keyboard: Arrow-key control, no model deployment required.

controls.hint: Use the arrow keys ← → or the buttons below to move your rocket one lane at a time. There are 4 lanes — 3 steps to cross the whole screen. One hit ends the run!
controls.title: How to play

difficultyDesc.easy: Slower balls, more time to react. Perfect for beginners.
difficultyDesc.medium: Balanced pace — a good starting point for most players.

dodge.goToGameHint: Pick a difficulty and start. You can configure the model later.

bci-alpha.desc: Profile tuned for basic left/right commands.
bci-alpha.name: BCI Alpha

bci-focus.desc: Profile tuned for calmer, more stable control.
bci-focus.name: BCI Focus

keyboard-demo.desc: Classic arrow-key control for quick testing.
keyboard-demo.name: Keyboard (demo)

model.subtitle: Choose which model will drive this game session
model.title: Control model

dodge.readySubtitle: Dodge the falling balls — one lane at a time
dodge.selectModelAndDeployHint: For BCI mode, select a model and deploy it first
dodge.selectModelHint: Select a control model to start
dodge.title: Rocket Run

hub.cardDodgeDescription: Colorful balls fall from the top across 4 lanes. Move left or right one lane at a time to dodge them. Perfect for BCI control.
hub.cardDodgeLead: Steer left and right. Survive as long as you can.
hub.subtitle: A dedicated space for classic play. Mind exercises and BCI drills live under “Mind exercises”.
hub.title: Minigames
